installCommand: if [ -f chatbot-rag-frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix chatbot-rag-frontend install; else npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f chatbot-rag-frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix chatbot-rag-frontend run build; else npm run build; fi
devCommand: if [ -f chatbot-rag-frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix chatbot-rag-frontend run dev; else npm run dev; fi
